M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.Main
Standard Java entry point.
Main - Class in com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6
Main entry point of the Sudoku 6x6 application.
Main() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.Main
 
ManejadorTeclado(int, int) - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController.ManejadorTeclado
Creates a handler bound to a specific cell position.
manejarClickCelda(MouseEvent, int, int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Handles a mouse click on a cell.
manejarNavegacionTeclado(KeyEvent, int, int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Handles keyboard navigation across cells of the Sudoku board.
manejarSolicitudAyuda() - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Requests a hint from the ProveedorAyuda, applies it to the model and highlights it visually in the UI.
mapaCampoCelda - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Mapping from each text field in the UI to its model cell.
mapaCeldaCampo - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Mapping from each model cell to its text field in the UI.
marcarComoFija(int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.Celda
Marks this cell as a fixed clue with the given value.
matrizCeldas - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.TableroSudoku
Two-dimensional matrix holding all cells of the board.
